# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-05-28

Unified outbound mail layer for self-hosted projects (HTTP form/API/SMTP → provider transports).

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Show HN: Posthorn, self-hosted mail gateway
   Concrete OSS tool that simplifies outbound email for self-hosted stacks.

2. Zero-Downtime Blue/Green Deployments on Render with Canary Traffic Splitting
   A concrete blueprint for coordinated multi-service deploys with canary traffic shaping + rollback.

3. We found out terminology drift screwed up 14 of our app's languages before we noticed
   Actionable ops lesson for i18n at scale: measure per-locale, enforce glossary in the pipeline.

4. How Growbots uses Claude Code + Val Town MCP for frictionless deployment
   Shows an emerging pattern: codegen-to-deploy loop via MCP, bypassing GitHub/build friction.

5. Show HN: Open-source Workspace (mail,docs,spreadsheet,drive) web/iOS
   Potentially interesting self-hosted suite + developer platform; needs verification before trusting for mail/data.

Full brief with all 40 researched links → https://thenightlylibrarian.com/briefs/2026-05-28
